titleStmt.title: SII 9.269: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 269. (A.R. No. 461 of 1923.) ON A SLAB PRESERVED IN THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE GARBHA-GRIHA OF THE NILAKANTHESVARA TEMPLE AT GOVINDAVADA, RAYADRUG TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1092, Virōdhi, Chaitra, śu. puṇṇami, Sōmavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa. The date is not regular. The given details corresponded to A.D. 1169 March 14 Friday, not Monday, as stated in the record. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tribhuvanamalla-Mallidēva-Chōḷamahārāja, son of Iruṅgōḷa-Chōḷamaharaja and grandson of Gōvindarāja. This Mallidēva, who was ruling from Gōvindavāḍi, is stated to have made a gift of the village Santaraṇe and of lands and cesses on some articles for the service of the god Nīlakaṇṭhēśvaradēva for whom a temple was built by his father. Sōmēśvara wrote the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśva
raṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḻukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattri
bhuvanamalladēvaru kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamire tatupādapadmōpajīvi . ślōka . śrīmānabhūnmanukulādhipa
mauḷiratnaṁ yasyāpa kaṁdukavinōdapadaṁ himādriḥ . yō dakṣiṇārṇnavamukhōdgatara
tnamālā . laṁkārarājaduṟeyūrppuracōḷanāmā . tasyānvayē samudabhūdati
lōkakīrttirggōviṁdarāja Iti rājakulaikasiṁhaḥ . Āsīdiyaṁ vasumatī vipulā ca pri
thvī yaṁ prāpya viśvavibhavaikanidhiṁ jitāriḥ . jajñē tasmātpravitatayaśōbhūriruṁgōḷabhūpaḥ
karṇnāṭāṁdhradraviḍaviḷasadgauḍakāḷiṁgavaṁgān jitvā saṁkhē vitaraṇavidhau vikramādityakarṇnaḥ
śrīṣṭhān bhūpānapi ca vidadhē nīlakaṁṭhālayaṁ yaḥ . tasyaurasō jagati viśrutaśastraśāstra . vijñānabhū
mirudiyāya dayānidhānaṁ . bāḷēṁdumauḷipadapaṁkajarēṇuśōṇa . lālāṭapaṭṭa
vibhavaḥ khaḷu mallidēvaḥ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍalēśvara . nuṟe
yūrppuravarādhīśvara caturudadhiparivritamahīmaṁḍalamāṁḍalika kṣatradharmma
pratipālanamanassvabhāva . baṁṭarabhāva . madavadarimāṁḍalikahridayasella . niga
ḷaṁkamalla . nānārtthisārtthaprārtthitārtthapradānanissīma . naralōkabhīma . śaraṇāgatārātina
rapatinikaraparipālaka . roddadēśagōpālaka . kalaśācalōdbhūtapūtabhūtaḷakāvērīvallabha .
bhayalōbhadurllabha . catuṣṣaṣṭimaṁḍalikaśiraḥkhaṁḍana . krīḍāpariṇatapracaṁḍadōrddaṁḍa naralō
kagaṁḍaragaṁḍa . samupagatavijayavīralakṣmīvidhṛtakalaśātapatra . kāśyapagōtra . kaṁbulapaṭupaṭṭa
haghōṣaṇānīka nistāritasamastalōka . tribhuvanabhavanōdarapradyōtitadinakarā
nvaya . cōḷakuḷānvaya . nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśva
raṁ tribhuvanamallamallidēvacōḷamahārājaru gōviṁdavāḍiyapurada nelevī
ḍinalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirddu sakavarṣa 1092 neya virōdhi
saṁvatsarada caitra suddha puṇnami sōmavārada sōmagrahaṇada mahātithiyaṁdu
śrīmaṁnīlakaṁṭhadēvara naivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ tapōdhanarāhāradānakkaṁ khaṁḍa
sphuṭitajīrṇnōdhdhārakkaṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ pātrapāvuḷakkaṁ dēvara śrīpādada sa�vopa
dalli dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi yaghahariyiṁ paḍuvadaḍiya saṁtaraṇeya ca
tuḥsīmeyiṁdoḷagaṇa jalapāṣāṇasāmyasahitamā vūrumaṁ dēvariṁ mūḍalu
hāṁbuḷigaya dāriyali 60 mattaru keyyumaṁ Aḍakeyalli sojjamumaṁ Ele hēṟiṁge
100 maṁ bhaṁḍiya battadalu baḷḷa 1 maṁ hēṟinalu mūlevattaṁ māna 1 maṁ Aṁgaḍi
yalu saṭṭu bhattamumaṁ . koṭṭariṁtī dattiyaṁ sarvvēśvarapaṁḍitara putraṁ kēdārē
śvarapaṁḍitaru sthānapatigaḷī dharmmamanārādoḍaṁ pratipāḷisuvarā
rorvvaru kiḍisidaḍe śrīvāraṇāsiyalli sahaśra kapileyumaṁ brāhma
ṇarumaṁ koṁdaṁtaha mahāpātakamakku . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . na vi
ṣaṁ viṣamityāhurddēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē . viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁti(ḥ) dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ .
bahubhiḥ vasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmiḥ tasya tasya tadā pha
laṁ . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pūrvvadattēṣu pālanaṁ pūrvvadattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niḥ
phalaṁ bhavēt . Intī sāsanavaṁ sōmēśvaraṁ baredaṁ maṁgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
